tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 庶見素冠兮，棘人欒欒兮，勞心慱慱兮。 庶見素衣兮，我心傷悲兮，聊與子同歸兮。 庶見素韠兮，我心蘊結兮，聊與子如一兮。

1 If I could but see the white cap, My toiled heart is worn with grief!
2 If I could but see the white [lower] dress! — My heart is wounded with sadness! I should be inclined to go and live with the wearer! ODES OF KWEI.
3 If I could but see the white knee-covers! — Sorrow is knotted in my heart! I should almost feel as of one soul with "the wearer!
